name: Spaghetti Primavera
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the firm tofu and press it between two plates with a weight on top to remove excess water.
2. In a bowl, mix together the marinade ingredients: 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 1 tablespoon oil, and 2 tablespoons wine vinegar.
3. Add the tofu to the marinade mixture and gently toss until evenly coated.
4. Let the tofu marinate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
5. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
6. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add chopped garlic and red onion, cooking until fragrant and translucent.
7. Add the marinated tofu to the skillet and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned on all sides.
8. Stir in cherry tomatoes, bell peppers, spinach, and any other desired vegetables. Cook until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
9. Drain the cooked spaghetti and reserve some pasta water.
10. Add the drained spaghetti to the skillet with the tofu and vegetables. Toss everything together, adding a small amount of reserved pasta water if needed to create a light sauce.
11. Serve the Spaghetti Primavera hot, garnished with fresh herbs like parsley or basil if desired.
